Off Calendar Oct-29-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SUNRUN INC.'s MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND.

The motion is granted as unopposed.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling
